title: Bridge Essay: Effects of long-term mindfulness meditation training on attentional capacity in

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Form/Meditation** (Phase 7) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Form/Meditation to mechanistic neuroscience through Effects, of, long-term, mindfulness, meditation.

**Effects of long-term mindfulness meditation training on attentional capacity in professional male fencer athletes.** — Sci Rep. PMID: 40234661. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-025-97179-w. Attention is acrucial cognitive ability for sports performance. The current research aimed to investigate whether long-term mindfulness meditation (MM) intervention enhances male athletes' attentional function and alters the activity of brain regions related to attention. In this experiment, we recruited 47 professional male fencer athletes completed two main trials-an MM trial and acontrol trial.
